title: Poco M8 Power is on its way as a rebranded Redmi
description: Earlier today, Redmi unveiled the Note 17 and Note 17 Pro in China. The former has the model number 26021RN18C. Meanwhile, in the latest HyperOS firmware build, references to a Poco M8 Power have been found, and this one has the model number 26021PC18I. Let's unpack that. "RN" stands for Redmi, "PC" stands for Poco. The last character in the model number denotes the region it's intended for - "C" is for China, "I" is for India. So, with all of that in mind, it certainly looks like the Poco M8 Power is headed to India at least - of course it could also be offered in other markets, but it's...

title: iQOO Z11 Lite's battery detailed ahead of launch
description: iQOO will launch the Z11 Lite on July 24. The brand previously confirmed that the Z11 Lite will support 44W charging, and it has now revealed that the smartphone will pack a 6,500 mAh battery. Additionally, iQOO said that the Z11 Lite will support reverse charging and bypass charging, with the battery retaining 80% of its health even after five years. Besides, with the Super Battery Saver Mode, the iQOO Z11 Lite will enable 30 minutes of 4G calls, 6 minutes of Google Maps use, 12 minutes of Instagram browsing, or 8 minutes of WhatsApp use with just 1% battery left. iQOO Z11 Lite...

title: Samsung teases Flex Titanium tech, a key innovation for its next-gen foldables
description: The Galaxy Z Fold7 featured a third generation of Armor FlexHinge, which was 27% thinner and 43% lighter than the hinge inside the Z Fold6. Now the company is introducing the next innovation that will make foldable displays even tougher and slimmer while minimizing the crease – Flex Titanium. This is just a preview of what is to come on Wednesday next week. The Flex Titanium technology promises a more refined viewing experience for the new Z Folds, while making the display more resistant to external shocks and the wear and tear of being folded and unfolded hundreds of thousands of...

title: Huawei Pura 90s Pro hands-on: a look at the more compact option in the duo
description: Huawei just announced its new Pura 90s phones - the Pura 90s Pro and the Pura 90s Pro Max. Two very similar phones but for slightly different crowds. Of course, the Pro Max gives you all the top-end features while the 90s Pro comes in a more compact footprint with minimal trade-offs. We already did a detailed hands-on of the Pura 90s Pro Max showing what the camera system is capable of. Huawei Pura 90s Pro The most notable difference between the two devices is the display size. The Pura 90s Pro gets a 6.6-inch screen, but doesn't skimp on the features. Just like the Pura 90s...

title: China smartphone market shrank in Q2, but Huawei and Apple bucked the trend
description: Omdia released its global smartphone market share report for the second quarter of this year (April-June) yesterday, and today it's following up with the picture for the Mainland China market. Overall shipments have declined by 2% compared to Q2 2025. Despite that, both Huawei and Apple have managed to grow their shipments and market shares. As you can see below, Huawei shipped a record 15.2 million devices for a 23% market share, up from 12.2 million and 18%, respectively, in the year-ago quarter. Apple, on the other hand, shipped 12.4 million iPhones for a 19% market share, up...

title: The biggest change rumored for the Samsung Galaxy S27 Ultra may not be happening
description: Back in April a rumor from Korea claimed that Samsung was redesigning the rears of the entire Galaxy S27 family, with the camera island being moved around in order for the company to be able to finally fit magnets for wireless charging to its flagship phones. A few days later the speculative render seen below emerged, purportedly showing the design of the Galaxy S27 Ultra (which is also expected to come with only three cameras). However, today a new rumor from Korea claims that Samsung hasn't decided anything yet. This source says all of the rumored designs (including the one...

title: Pixel Watch 5 official press renders have leaked
description: Unlike the Pixel 11 lineup, the Pixel Watch 5 hasn't been the subject of many leaks. However, details about its pricing and color options leaked recently, and now the smartwatch has surfaced in official-looking press renders ahead of its expected debut on August 12. The Tide Chart, in collaboration with OnLeaks, has shared official-looking renders of the Pixel Watch 5, showcasing the smartwatch in four case finishes and two size options. Pixel Watch 5 45mm in Dark Anthracite and Pyrite Looking at the leaked renders, the Pixel Watch 5 appears to retain a design that's largely...

title: You can now talk to Spotify
description: Spotify is rolling out a new feature starting today. Basically, it's a built-in AI chatbot that lets you talk to Spotify both in the Home view and in Now Playing. This will only be available on mobile. You aren't limited to talking, however - you can also type your requests or questions. You can have a back-and-forth conversation with Spotify, just like you can with any other AI chatbot. You can learn more about the music you love, revisit your listening history, go deeper on podcasts and audiobooks - or just ask to hear some artists you have never heard before. Once...

title: Honor Robot Phone's key specifications leak
description: Despite showcasing its Robot Phone at CES and MWC earlier this year, Honor has yet to reveal its hardware details. A new leak, however, has now revealed the upcoming phone’s key specifications. Tipster Digital Chat Station has shared the alleged specs of the Honor Robot Phone on Weibo ahead of its rumored debut next month. According to the tipster, the phone will sport a flat display with a 1.5K resolution measuring between 6.3 and 6.4 inches. It is said to be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 chipset. In the camera department, the Robot Phone is tipped to feature a 200MP...

title: Apple releases the first iOS 27 public beta
description: Apple went through several iOS 27 betas, but those were only for developers. Now, the company has released the first public beta of iOS 27 – as well as public betas for the related iPadOS 27, watchOS 27, macOS 27 and tvOS 27. The stable release is coming this fall. But if you want to get an early start, you can sign up for the Apple Beta Software Program and install version 27 on your device today. Which phones are supported? Apple didn’t drop compatibility, so if your phone runs version 26, it can run version 27 too. This means iPhone 11 or newer (including iPhone SE (2020) or...

title: ChatGPT is back in WhatsApp in Europe thanks to the European Commission
description: Last month, the European Commission (EC) announced that it would be forcing Meta to allow third-party AI chatbots in WhatsApp for free in the European Economic Area (EEA). The decision followed Meta's ban of third-party AI chatbots in WhatsApp last November, and the company's subsequent move from March when it once again accepted third-party AI chatbots in WhatsApp, but only for a fee. As a consequence of the EC's decision, today ChatGPT is back on WhatsApp in the EEA. You can chat with it in WhatsApp at the phone number 1-800-CHATGPT, without needing to install the ChatGPT...

title: Gemini in Chrome reaches an important new market
description: Google expanded the availability of Gemini inside the Chrome browser to multiple countries back in June, and today it's finally made it to one of the biggest markets that it was missing from: the UK. The rollout is starting with Chrome on desktop, and Gemini will become available in Chrome on iOS in the UK next month. Gemini in Chrome can chat with you, summarize open tabs, compare information across multiple tabs, remember context from past conversations, generate and edit images with Nano Banana 2, and much more, all without you having to leave the page you’re...

title: Hisense unveils an Android 16 phone with an e-ink display and a detachable LCD, the Hisense A10
description: There are smartphones with e-ink displays and while they are great for reading, Android just wasn’t designed with slow refresh rate speeds in mind. What can be done about it? Well, e-ink panels are getting faster and faster, but they still aren’t “there” yet. So, Hisense had an alternative solution in mind. And so it built the Hisense A10. On its front is a 6.13” e-ink panel, similar to what you would find on a Kindle ebook reader. The solution comes in the form of a detachable LCD that you can magnetically snap on the back of the phone. Right now, the exact specifics of this add-on...

title: 7-inch Redmi Note 17 unveiled with 8,000mAh battery, 17 Pro joins it with a 9,000mAh battery
description: Xiaomi introduced the Redmi Note 17 series in China with much larger batteries than their predecessors (the Note 15 series) along with new chipsets. The Pro model is the small one with a 6.83” display – you read that right, this is the small display this time around. This is because the Redmi Note 17 has a massive 7” display. It is a 120Hz OLED panel with 1,080 x 2,396px resolution and it can put out 1,800 nits of peak brightness. The touchscreen can work with wet or gloved hands. You would think that such a large display would be paired with a large battery – and you’d be right!...

title: iQOO 16's camera and battery details tipped, Z12 series and Neo12 to pack bigger batteries
description: The iQOO 16 is rumored to launch in September, and while iQOO hasn't divulged anything about it yet, reliable tipster Digital Chat Station has shared new details about the smartphone. In a post on Weibo, DCS said that a smartphone powered by the unannounced 2nm Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 Pro will feature symmetrical dual speakers (1115 series) and an X-axis motor (0916 series). While the phone's name isn't mentioned in the Weibo post, DCS is believed to be referring to the iQOO 16. The tipster also claimed that this smartphone is tested with a primary camera that uses the 50MP OmniVision...

title: New rumor downgrades the Redmi K100 Pro Max's chipset
description: The first details about the upcoming Redmi K100 Pro Max were outed all the way back in March, and today Digital Chat Station has shared some new information about the device on Weibo. Interestingly, in March the K100 Pro Max was said to be powered by the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6 chipset, but now it seems like Redmi has instead opted for the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5. If the original plan was to go with the next-gen SoC, then this is most likely a cost-cutting measure related to the ongoing chip shortage. The Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 is clearly going to be cheaper than its successor, and...

title: Samsung releases fourth One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26 series
description: Almost exactly a month after it released the third One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26 devices, Samsung has today started rolling out the fourth beta. This appears to be available in India first, with the firmware version ending in ZZG4. If you are enrolled in the One UI 9 beta program, you will of course receive this as an over-the-air update soon. It comes in at around 1.25GB, so make sure you download it over a fast enough network. The changelog mentions a lot of bug fixes as you can see in the screenshots below. Problems with the clock size, Quick Panel, navigation bar, timer...

title: Samsung teases the next Galaxy Watch and its AI-powered "Health Companion"
description: Samsung is holding its next Unpacked event on July 22 in London, and on that occasion it's going to unveil the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, Galaxy Z Flip8, but also, according to a ton of past rumors, the Galaxy Watch Ultra2 and the Galaxy Watch9. Today the company has released the video you can see below, which is teasing its next smartwatches, along with what it calls a "new AI-powered Health Companion". Samsung says the Galaxy Watch will play "a critical role as a health-first, always-on gateway for advanced, personalized AI". The company promises that...

title: Redmi teases new color options for the Note 17 and Note 17 Pro
description: With just hours to go until the Redmi Note 17 series goes official in China, Redmi has revealed more color options for the Note 17 and Note 17 Pro. Earlier teasers had showcased the Note 17 Pro in Clear Blue and the standard Note 17 in the Meteor Purple finish. Redmi has revealed the Note 17 in a new Light Green color option, joining the previously announced Meteor Purple finish. The company has already confirmed that the Note 17 will feature a 7-inch OLED display with a 120Hz refresh rate, an 8,000mAh battery with 45W wired charging support, and a 50-megapixel primary rear...

title: Pixel 11 series US pricing and key specs revealed via leaked listing
description: Google will unveil the Pixel 11 series on August 12. Ahead of the launch, leaked renders have already revealed the designs of the Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, Pixel 11 Pro XL, and Pixel 11 Pro Fold. New leaks have now shed light on the lineup's US pricing and key specs. According to a report by Droid Life, citing since-deleted Amazon listings for the Pixel 11 lineup, the base Pixel 11 will start at $899 for the 256GB variant. The alleged listings suggest that Google has dropped the 128GB base storage option. Meanwhile, the 512GB variant of the Pixel 11 is listed with a price tag of...
